description: Asset manifest for Neon Palace slot game — luxury cyber palace theme
style: AAA casino, luxury cyber palace, black glass, antique gold, chrome, royal purple, premium cinematic lighting

assets.name: Palace Hall Background
assets.fallback: css:AmbientBackground component (radial gradients + light beams)
assets.usage: Full-page background behind the cabinet
assets.generationPrompt: Luxury casino palace interior, ultra-wide panoramic background, deep black marble floors with gold inlays, ornate baroque columns with chrome accents, royal purple velvet drapes, dramatic volumetric ceiling lights casting golden beams downward, neon accent lighting in purple and teal, extreme depth of field, dark atmospheric cinematic lighting, 8k render quality, no people, no text, no UI elements, no existing casino IP, photorealistic, horizontal orientation
assets.notes: Must tile/scale vertically. Currently replaced by CSS AmbientBackground component with atmospheric orbs and light pillars.

assets.name: Slot Machine Cabinet
assets.fallback: css:Premium cabinet div with multi-layer box-shadow bevel
assets.usage: Cabinet body behind and around the reel window
assets.generationPrompt: Premium arcade slot machine cabinet body, luxury black lacquered wood with chrome trim, antique gold engraved decorative panels, subtle neon purple glow strips along edges, beveled chrome corners with rivet details, dark mirror-polished surface reflections, cinematic studio lighting, isolated on transparent background, front-facing view, no reel window area in center, 8k render quality
assets.notes: Cabinet body only — reel window area must be transparent so reels show through. Use as CSS background-image behind reel grid.

assets.name: Reel Window Frame
assets.fallback: css:Gold bevel border + chrome separators
assets.usage: Decorative frame surrounding the 5-reel grid
assets.generationPrompt: Slot machine reel window frame, luxury antique gold beveled frame, thick ornate border with engraved geometric patterns, chrome inner edge with inner shadow depth, subtle neon purple ambient glow around edges, dark glass center area (fully transparent), top and bottom have decorative gold scrollwork, 8k quality render, transparent background PNG
assets.notes: Center must be fully transparent (PNG alpha) — reels render behind this frame. Exported at 2x for retina.

assets.name: Jackpot Display Panel
assets.fallback: css:Dark metal plate with LED digit boxes
assets.usage: Progressive jackpot counter display above reels
assets.generationPrompt: Casino progressive jackpot display panel, dark brushed metal plate with engraved JACKPOT text, rows of individual LED digit display windows with amber/gold numeric glow, antique gold rivets at corners, subtle chrome bevel edge, warm inner light glow behind digits, cinematic studio lighting, isolated transparent background PNG, horizontal orientation
assets.notes: Background plate only — digit numbers rendered in CSS/HTML over this image.

assets.name: Spin Button
assets.fallback: css:Gold convex button with bottom-edge shadow
assets.usage: Primary spin action button
assets.generationPrompt: Premium arcade button, large circular convex gold button, antique gold brushed metal surface with subtle radial texture, bright specular highlight on upper-left quadrant, dark chrome base ring with depth shadow, inner neon purple glow ring, 3D raised appearance, cinematic studio lighting, isolated transparent background PNG, top-down slight angle view
assets.notes: Two states needed: normal (gold) and pressed (darker, translated down). Normal state only for now.

assets.name: Bet Adjustment Button
assets.fallback: css:Dark recessed button with chrome edge
assets.usage: + and - bet adjustment buttons
assets.generationPrompt: Small premium casino button, square with rounded corners, dark black glass surface, chrome beveled edge, subtle neon purple glow on hover state, inset shadow for depth, clean minimalist design, isolated transparent background PNG, 48x48px target
assets.notes: 2x export (96px) for retina. Same design used for + and − buttons, label rendered in CSS.

assets.name: Auto Spin Button
assets.fallback: css:Dark button with teal accent when active
assets.usage: Auto-spin toggle button
assets.generationPrompt: Small premium casino toggle button, rectangular with rounded corners, dark black glass surface, teal neon edge glow (active state), chrome frame, minimal clean design, isolated transparent PNG
assets.notes: Active/inactive states. Currently rendered as CSS button.

assets.name: Turbo Spin Button
assets.fallback: css:Dark button with magenta accent when active
assets.usage: Turbo speed toggle button
assets.generationPrompt: Small premium casino speed button, rectangular rounded, dark glass surface, hot pink/magenta neon edge glow active state, lightning bolt icon embossed in chrome, isolated transparent PNG
assets.notes: Active/inactive states. Currently rendered as CSS button.

assets.name: Wild Crown Symbol
assets.fallback: svg:Crown with jeweled inlays (inline SVG in SymbolArt)
assets.usage: Highest value wild symbol — substitutes all symbols
assets.generationPrompt: AAA casino slot symbol, majestic royal crown, antique gold with platinum accents, five prominent points each topped with a different colored gemstone (sapphire, ruby, emerald, diamond, amethyst), ornate filigree metalwork between points, centered diamond on front face, dramatic warm cinematic lighting from above, volumetric golden aura, isolated on fully transparent background, square 512x512, no text, no watermarks, no shadows outside symbol, ultra-high detail
assets.notes: WILD label omitted — rendered in CSS. Must have clean transparent background. Centered in square canvas.

assets.name: Scatter Star Gem Symbol
assets.fallback: svg:Hexagonal gemstone with teal/magenta gradient (inline SVG in SymbolArt)
assets.usage: Scatter symbol — 3+ triggers free spins
assets.generationPrompt: AAA casino slot symbol, magical star-shaped gemstone, eight-pointed star cut with facets that refract teal and hot-pink light simultaneously, glowing from within, brilliant caustic light rays radiating outward, translucent cyan and magenta internal color, dramatic backlit cinematic lighting, isolated on fully transparent background, square 512x512, no text, maximum gem clarity detail
assets.notes: SCATTER label rendered in CSS. Must glow — but keep glow contained to avoid transparent-bg issues.

assets.notes: Server maps high_1 → ZEUS → diamond.webp

assets.name: Big Win Overlay
assets.fallback: css:BigWinOverlay component (CSS animation + gradient text)
assets.usage: Full-screen win celebration for 'big' tier wins (15x–49x)
assets.generationPrompt: Casino big win celebration graphic, centered bold text BIG WIN in antique gold metallic 3D lettering, dramatic rays of golden light burst from text, coin and star particles scattered around, dark purple atmospheric background with subtle glow, cinematic composition, isolated for overlay compositing, square 1080x1080
assets.notes: Used as bg-image overlay. Text rendered separately in CSS so animation works.

assets.name: Mega Win Overlay
assets.fallback: css:BigWinOverlay component with mega config
assets.usage: Full-screen win celebration for 'mega' tier wins (100x+)
assets.generationPrompt: Casino mega win celebration graphic, explosive visual, centered bold text MEGA WIN in rainbow holographic 3D chrome lettering, massive light explosion with beams of red cyan and gold, showers of gold coins and gemstones raining down, dark atmospheric background, ultra-dramatic cinematic composition, isolated for overlay compositing, square 1080x1080
assets.notes: Most dramatic overlay. CSS animation plays on top.

assets.name: Epic Win Overlay
assets.fallback: css:BigWinOverlay component with epic config
assets.usage: Full-screen win celebration for 'epic' tier wins (50x–99x)
assets.generationPrompt: Casino epic win celebration graphic, bold text EPIC WIN in purple amethyst 3D lettering with gold trim, royal purple light burst, scattered gems and sparkles, dramatic atmospheric glow, dark background, isolated for compositing, square 1080x1080
assets.notes: Mid-tier between big and mega.

assets.name: Jackpot Overlay
assets.fallback: css:BigWinOverlay component with jackpot config
assets.usage: Full-screen celebration when progressive jackpot is hit
assets.generationPrompt: Casino jackpot win celebration, ultimate visual spectacle, centered bold text JACKPOT! in blazing gold-to-white gradient 3D lettering with lens flare, massive explosion of gold coins raining from above, rainbow light rays from center, extreme dramatic cinematic lighting, dark palatial background with purple undertones, maximum visual impact, isolated for compositing, square 1080x1080
assets.notes: Only triggered on jackpot hit (all 5 WILD on middle row). Must be most impressive overlay.

assets.name: Coin Particle
assets.fallback: css:Gold circle div with radial gradient
assets.usage: Burst particle emitted on win — coin shape
assets.generationPrompt: Single gold coin, antique gold with slight shine, front face with simple engraved palace logo pattern, clean round shape, isolated on fully transparent background, square 64x64, cartoon-stylized but premium quality
assets.notes: Used in ParticleSystem as CSS background-image. Currently replaced by CSS circle/square divs.

assets.name: Glow/Sparkle Particle
assets.fallback: css:Radial gradient transparent circle
assets.usage: Soft glow sparkle particle emitted on win
assets.generationPrompt: Magical sparkle/glow particle, four-pointed star with soft radiant glow, gold and white color, maximum transparency falloff to edges, isolated on fully transparent background, square 64x64
assets.notes: Blended additively over scene for extra sparkle effect.

assets.name: Spin Start Sound
assets.fallback: web-audio:SoundEngine.playSpin() Web Audio API synthesis
assets.usage: Played when spin button pressed, reel animation begins
assets.generationPrompt: Casino slot machine spin start sound effect, mechanical reel acceleration, brief whoosh with metal click, satisfying premium feel, 0.5 seconds duration, stereo, 44100Hz, -3dBFS peak, WAV source then convert to MP3 192kbps
assets.notes: Currently synthesized by SoundEngine class using Web Audio API oscillators. Replace by loading this file in SoundEngine.playSpin().

assets.name: Reel Stop Sound
assets.fallback: web-audio:SoundEngine.playReel() Web Audio API synthesis
assets.usage: Played when each individual reel stops — 5 total per spin
assets.generationPrompt: Casino slot reel stop click sound, single mechanical thump with brief resonance tail, metallic, authoritative, 0.15 seconds, 5 pitch variants needed (different tones for reels 1-5), stereo 44100Hz MP3 192kbps
assets.notes: Need 5 files: reel-stop-0.mp3 through reel-stop-4.mp3 for pitch variety across reels.

assets.name: Win Sound Effects
assets.fallback: web-audio:SoundEngine.playWin() Web Audio API synthesis
assets.usage: Played on wins — 3 variants for small/medium/big tiers
assets.generationPrompt: Casino win jingle sound effect, [VARIANT: small=brief 3-note ascending chime 0.5s | medium=5-note fanfare 1s | big=triumphant 8-note orchestral sting 2s with coin sounds], premium cinematic casino feel, stereo 44100Hz MP3 192kbps
assets.notes: Need 3 files: win-small.mp3, win-medium.mp3, win-big.mp3. Jackpot uses jackpot_sfx separately.

assets.name: Jackpot Sound Effect
assets.fallback: web-audio:SoundEngine.playWin('mega') Web Audio API synthesis
assets.usage: Played exclusively on jackpot hit — most impactful sound
assets.generationPrompt: Casino jackpot sound effect, dramatic escalating orchestral hit with bells choir and coins avalanche, 3 second build-up then massive climax, triumphant luxury casino feel, stereo 44100Hz MP3 192kbps, -2dBFS peak
assets.notes: This is the most important audio asset. Should feel truly special.

assets.name: Background Ambient Music
assets.fallback: none:No background music in current implementation
assets.usage: Looping ambient background music during gameplay
assets.generationPrompt: Casino ambient background music loop, luxury cyber palace atmosphere, slow mystical electronic with subtle orchestral undertones, royal purple and gold mood, tempo 90bpm, no lyrics, seamless loop at 60 second mark, cinematic production quality, stereo 44100Hz MP3 192kbps
assets.notes: Not yet wired into SoundEngine. Add bgm HTMLAudioElement with loop=true, controlled by volume slider.
